font_stack: Geist + Geist Mono via next/font local files; app/globals.css previously hard-coded Arial
palette: shadcn HSL variables in app/globals.css mapped by tailwind.config.ts; Hallmark OKLCH tokens added in tokens.css
motion: motion-cut; no framer-motion, motion, gsap, lenis, lottie-react, react-spring, or auto-animate dependency found
spacing: Tailwind default spacing with Hallmark 4-point semantic tokens added
